title: Fix podman-restart.service systemd unit description after changing to also restart unless-stopped containers
body:
Hi,

the [podman-restart.service systemd unit description](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/03aae7e7fcac95db0bd0bff5997493d51b90d207/contrib/systemd/system/podman-restart.service.in#L2) still says 
```
Description=Podman Start All Containers With Restart Policy Set To Always
```
when after https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27619 it should say
```
Description=Podman Start All Containers With Restart Policy Set To Always and Unless-Stopped
```

This should avoid confusion about when containers actually get restarted by the systemd service.

comments.body: That's valid; you can send in a PR with the change?

CONTRIBUTING.MD says
> Use your real name (sorry, no pseudonyms or anonymous contributions).

So sorry, but I'd rather not 😶‍🌫️
